entry.title: CFA
entry.content:
CFA

Ch.1

  • FVN=PV(1+r)NFV_N = PV(1+r)^NFVN​=PV(1+r)N

  • FVN=PV(1+rsm)mNFV_N=PV(1+\dfrac{r_s}{m})^{mN}FVN​=PV(1+mrs​​)mN

  • FVN=PVersNFV_N=PVe^{r_sN}FVN​=PVers​N

  • EAR=(1+rm)m−1EAR=(1+r_m)^m-1EAR=(1+rm​)m−1

  • EAR=ers−1EAR=e^{r_s}-1EAR=ers​−1

  • FVN=A[(1+r)N−1r]FV_N=A[\dfrac{(1+r)^N-1}{r}]FVN​=A[r(1+r)N−1​]

  • PV=FVN[1(1+r)N]PV=FV_N[\dfrac{1}{(1+r)^N}]PV=FVN​[(1+r)N1​]

  • PV=FVN[1+rsm]−mNPV=FV_N[1+\dfrac{r_s}{m}]^{-mN}PV=FVN​[1+mrs​​]−mN

  • PV=A[1−1(1+r)Nr]PV=A\left[\dfrac{1-\dfrac{1}{(1+r)^N}}{r}\right]PV=A⎣⎢⎢⎢⎡​r1−(1+r)N1​​⎦⎥⎥⎥⎤​

  • PV=A/rPV=A/rPV=A/r

  • g=(FVNPV)1N−1g=(\dfrac{FV_N}{PV})^{\frac{1}{N}}-1g=(PVFVN​​)N1​−1

Ch.2

  • XG=X1X2X3...XnnX_G=\sqrt[n]{X_1X_2X_3...X_n}XG​=nX1​X2​X3​...Xn​​

  • RG=[∏t=1T(1+Rt)]1r−1R_G=\left[\prod^T_{t=1}(1+R_t)\right]^{\frac{1}{r}}-1RG​=[t=1∏T​(1+Rt​)]r1​−1

  • XH=n∑i=1n1XiX_H=\dfrac{n}{\sum^n_{i=1}{\frac{1}{X_i}}}XH​=∑i=1n​Xi​1​n​

  • Xˉ×XH=XG\bar{X} \times X_H=X_GXˉ×XH​=XG​

  • Mean absolute deviation: MAD=∑i=1n∣Xi−xˉ∣n\text{Mean absolute deviation: }MAD=\dfrac{\sum^n_{i=1}|X_i-\bar{x}|}{n}Mean absolute deviation: MAD=n∑i=1n​∣Xi​−xˉ∣​

  • s2=∑i=1n(Xi−Xˉ)2n−1s^2=\dfrac{\sum^n_{i=1}(X_i-\bar{X})^2}{n-1}s2=n−1∑i=1n​(Xi​−Xˉ)2​

  • Coefficient of Variation: CV=sXˉ\text{Coefficient of Variation: }CV=\dfrac{s}{\bar{X}}Coefficient of Variation: CV=Xˉs​

  • sxy=∑i=1n(xi−xˉ)(yi−yˉ)n−1s_{xy}=\dfrac{\sum^n_{i=1}(x_i-\bar{x})(y_i-\bar{y})}{n-1}sxy​=n−1∑i=1n​(xi​−xˉ)(yi​−yˉ​)​

  • Correlation Coefficient: rxy=sxysxsy\text{Correlation Coefficient: }r_{xy}=\dfrac{s_{xy}}{s_xs_y}Correlation Coefficient: rxy​=sx​sy​sxy​​

Ch.3

  • P(A∣B)=P(AB)P(B)P(A|B) = \frac{P(AB)}{P(B)}P(A∣B)=P(B)P(AB)​

  • P(AorB)=P(A)+P(B)−P(AB)P(A or B) = P(A) + P(B) - P(AB)P(AorB)=P(A)+P(B)−P(AB)

  • Independent: P(AB)=P(A)P(B)\text{Independent: }P(AB) = P(A)P(B)Independent: P(AB)=P(A)P(B)

  • Cov(x,y)=E[(x−E(x))(y−E(y))]Cov(x,y)=E[(x-E(x))(y-E(y))]Cov(x,y)=E[(x−E(x))(y−E(y))]

  • σ2(Rp)=ΣΣwiwjCov(Ri,Rj)\sigma^2(R_p) = \Sigma\Sigma w_iw_jCov(R_i,R_j)σ2(Rp​)=ΣΣwi​wj​Cov(Ri​,Rj​)

  • P(A∣B)=P(B∣A)P(B)P(A)P(A|B)=\dfrac{P(B|A)}{P(B)}P(A)P(A∣B)=P(B)P(B∣A)​P(A)

entry.title: 复制弹窗
entry.content:
复制弹窗

此教程基于猕猴桃🥝的教程：

博客魔改教程总结(三) | Fomalhaut🥝

正确代码如下：

在\js\copy.js中加入如下代码：

最后引入，然后三连，即可。

entry.title: 阴阳论
